layout.name: segmentData
layout.tooltip: Which NPCs get released when the Barrglar breaks.
layout.title: Segments

children.name: defaultColour
children.title: Default Colour
children.tooltip: The colour of this segment. 1: red. 2: blue. 3: yellow. Only used if 'Use custom Colour' is off.

children.name: useCustom
children.title: Use custom Colour
children.tooltip: If ticked, the Default Colour will be ignored, instead using the colour picked from the colour wheel below.

children.name: customColour
children.title: Colour
children.tooltip: The colour this segment is using. Only gets picked when 'Use custom Colour' is ticked.

layout.name: fireworktimer
layout.title: Shooting Invervall
layout.tooltip: The amount of frames between each firework rocket shot.

layout.name: fireworkspeed
layout.title: Shooting Speed
layout.tooltip: The speed a rocket is shot at. The faster it is, the higher it will reach, obviously

layout.name: segmentCount
layout.title: [OLD] Segments
layout.tooltip:
[OLD] The amount of pixels the Hanabihai has.
only used when the segment list is empty

layout.name: colourSet
layout.title: [OLD] Colours
layout.tooltip:
[OLD] The colours of each individual segment (starting from the bottom). Enter like this:
 1 2 3 (1: red. 2: blue. 3: yellow) You can also use hex codes!
 There should be as many values given as there are segments
only used when the segment list is empty
